thickness.$description: dimension used by the progress component for linear thickness.

radius.$description: dimension used by the progress component for linear radius.

size.$description: dimension used by the progress component for circular size.

track-width.$description: dimension used by the progress component for circular track width.

color.$description: color used by the progress component for track color.
color used by the progress component for indicator color.

duration.$description: duration used by the progress component for progress indeterminate duration.
